settings.heading: Join the Creative Mines Trade Program
settings.subheading: Enjoy exclusive trade pricing, complimentary samples, and personalized support—all designed to help you bring your boldest visions to life.

settings.title: Order Samples
settings.description: We make it easy. Order a sample online today and see firsthand the difference Creative Mines brings to high-design masonry projects.

settings.title: Product Catalog
settings.description: Download our new Source Book showcasing innovative profiles, authentic textures, and hand-crafted artisan color palettes.

settings.title: Seamless Textures
settings.description: Access our seamless textures, 3D patterns, and design features through Architextures. Easily adjust grout colors and installation techniques. Download AutoCAD and Revit files to streamline your workflow.

settings.title: Technical Downloads
settings.description: Access all technical documents, 3 part specification, testing results, installation guidelines and warranty details.

settings.title: Installation Details
settings.description: Creative Mines is an active member of the CMHA and recommends installers follow the MSV Installation Guide and Detailing Options for Compliance with ASTM C1780 standards and best practices.

settings.title: Online CEU Course
settings.description:
Take our online CEU course - The Elegance of Stone in Biophilic Design


Course Description: 
This course offers architects and design professionals a comprehensive understanding of how the elegance of stone can be harnessed within the framework of biophilic design to create environments that prioritize both sustainability and human well-being. We've partnered with Education Ascent to allow easy online access to this course and 1 learning unit.

settings.heading: Commercial
settings.text: We’re all in on commercial work—big, small, complex, or completely one-of-a-kind. From jobsite mock-ups to custom color creation, we help dial in the perfect mix of stone, brick, and masonry materials for your design. If you’re building something unique, we’re the team you want in your corner.

settings.heading: Residential
settings.text: We help you create the moments that make a home unforgettable, from standout fireplaces to feature walls and exteriors that speak to your architectural vernacular. Creative Mines guides you in selecting materials that become the true focal point of your home.

settings.description:
Located in the exclusive North Ranch neighborhood of Westlake Village, this 6,000+ square-foot residence showcases JRP’s Design & Remodel refined approach to modern luxury.

Designed as a single-story retreat, the home blends a mountain-inspired aesthetic with a modern rustic sensibility. Creative Mines Greypearl Foothill Rubble, finished with an overgrout technique, brings texture, depth, and a timeless masonry presence that grounds the architecture and elevates the overall design.

Mid-Century Modern design is a celebration of simplicity, function, and connection where architecture and landscape exist in quiet harmony.  One of Mid-Century Modern’s signature elements is the use of clean, modular masonry. Modern Paintgrade
Block™ captures this essence with its smooth, uniform face and structured rectangular form. Stacked bond installations reinforce the movement’s emphasis on repetition, proportion, and visual rhythm.

Tays & Co Design Studio was awarded 9 different awards from Midwest Home Magazine, including 1st for Interior Use of Stone and 2nd for Exterior Use of Stone.   This project featured a Creative Mines Mixology of Coyote Farmhouse Ledge and Coyote Foothill Rubble.

settings.heading: Ready to Partner with Creative Mines?
